name: Deluxe King Room
shortDescription: A sun-drenched sanctuary with a king bed, warm linen, and afternoon light.
longDescription: The Deluxe King Room offers 38 square metres of thoughtfully curated comfort. Warm natural light filters through floor-length sheer curtains, illuminating hand-selected furnishings and tactile textiles. A rain shower, Nespresso machine, and pillow menu ensure your every preference is met.

images.alt: Sunlit Deluxe King Room with king bed, champagne linen, and sheer curtains filtering afternoon light
Freestanding bathtub in the Deluxe King Room bathroom with marble flooring and gold fixtures

name: Garden Suite
shortDescription: Elegant suite with private garden terrace and indoor-outdoor living aesthetic.
longDescription: Our Garden Suite seamlessly blends indoor elegance with outdoor tranquility. Featuring open French doors that lead to a private terrace adorned with terracotta planters and trailing jasmine, this suite offers a unique sanctuary for those seeking a connection with nature without sacrificing luxury.

images.alt: Garden Suite interior with open French doors leading to a private terrace
Private terrace of the Garden Suite at dusk

name: Classic Twin Room
shortDescription: Calm and restful atmosphere with two pristine beds and soft morning light.
longDescription: The Classic Twin Room is designed for shared comfort. Two neatly made beds with crisp white linens are set against a neutral palette of warm ivory and sand. A small writing desk and soft lighting create a peaceful environment for relaxation or light work.

images.alt: Classic Twin Room with two pristine white beds

name: Panoramic Penthouse
shortDescription: The ultimate luxury experience with floor-to-ceiling city views and expansive living space.
longDescription: Perched on the top floor, the Panoramic Penthouse offers unparalleled views of the city skyline. This expansive suite features a grand living area, a private dining room, and a master bedroom with a spa-inspired bathroom. Every corner is designed to provide the ultimate in luxury and privacy.

images.alt: Panoramic Penthouse living area with floor-to-ceiling windows
Penthouse master bedroom with city views

name: Executive Suite
shortDescription: Sophisticated space designed for the modern professional, blending work and relaxation.
longDescription: Our Executive Suite is the perfect choice for business travelers who require both a productive workspace and a refined place to unwind. Featuring a dedicated office area, high-speed connectivity, and a plush king bed, this suite ensures you stay at the top of your game.

images.alt: Executive Suite with dedicated workspace and king bed

name: Family Connecting Room
shortDescription: Spacious and versatile layout with two connected rooms, perfect for families.
longDescription: Designed with families in mind, our Connecting Rooms provide the perfect balance of togetherness and privacy. With two separate bedrooms and bathrooms linked by a private internal door, this setup offers ample space for everyone to relax and enjoy their stay.

images.alt: Family Connecting Room with spacious layout
